strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in enterprise settings
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators)
Proven track record in scalable systems, testing frameworks, and CI/CD practices across multiple industries
concerns: Primary stack includes Ember.js (not React/Vitest as required), though recent roles emphasize modern tools
Limited direct experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services (secondary stack requirement)
Scattered work history with multiple short-term roles (though many are senior positions)
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional full-stack expertise with TypeScript and Node.js, including direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure—highly relevant to the role. His MongoDB, Docker, and CI/CD experience aligns well with requirements. However, his primary frontend experience includes Ember.js rather than React/Vitest, and Kotlin/Java experience is limited. His diverse background shows adaptability but raises questions about long-term role fit.
